jobPostingInfo.title: Engineering Intern – AI-Assisted Mobile Testing & Migration
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Be visionary

Teledyne Technologies Incorporated provides enabling technologies for industrial growth markets that require advanced technology and high reliability. These markets include aerospace and defense, factory automation, air and water quality environmental monitoring, electronics design and development, oceanographic research, deepwater oil and gas exploration and production, medical imaging and pharmaceutical research.​

We are looking for individuals who thrive on making an impact and want the excitement of being on a team that wins.

Job Description

The Engineering Intern – AI-Assisted Mobile Testing & Migration will support the development, testing, and modernization of mobile applications used for aircraft maintenance and aircraft performance operations in safety‑critical, operational environments. This internship focuses on applying AI‑assisted tools and techniques to improve the testing and reliability of mobile applications that support aircraft health monitoring, maintenance workflows, aircraft performance calculations, and flight crew or ground crew decision support. The role also contributes to technology migration initiatives, including mobile framework upgrades, platform transitions, and CI/CD modernization aligned with regulated aviation software practices.

This role is ideal for students pursuing degrees in Aerospace Engineering, Software Engineering, or related fields who are interested in aircraft systems, performance engineering, mobile application development, test automation, AI‑assisted engineering workflows, and modern software practices supporting aviation operations.

ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Assist with manual and automated testing for iOS and Android applications.
  • Support AI-assisted testing workflows including test generation and analysis.
  • Contribute to mobile application technology and framework migration efforts.
  • Validate behavior across devices, OS versions, and environments.
  • Support CI/CD-based test execution (e.g., GitHub Actions).
  • Document test cases and results using Jira-based tools.
  • Participate in Agile ceremonies and collaborate with engineering teams.

EDUCATION AND/OR EXPERIENCE:

  • Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant engineering discipline.
  • Exposure to software testing, mobile apps, or AI technologies is a plus but not required.

COMPUTER SKILLS:

  • Basic programming in Python, Swift, or C#
  • Git and source control fundamentals
  • Interest in CI/CD, mobile platforms, and AI-assisted tooling

OTHER SKILLS AND ABILITIES:

  • Strong curiosity and learning mindset
  • Good communication and teamwork skills
  • Attention to detail and quality
  • Interest in applying AI to real-world engineering problems

POSITION TYPE/EXPECTED HOURS OF WORK:

This is a full-time position, and hours of work and days are Monday through Friday within one hour plus/minus of 7:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. This position may at times require long hours and weekend or holiday work reflecting workload and deadlines.

JOB COMPETENCIES:

  • Foundational Technical Skills: Demonstrates a working understanding of software development and testing fundamentals, including basic programming, debugging, and test execution for mobile applications.
  • Mobile & Platform Awareness: Understands core mobile application concepts (iOS and/or Android), including device variability, OS versions, and application lifecycle considerations.
  • Test & Quality Mindset: Displays attention to detail and an appreciation for software quality, validation, and defect prevention, even when working on learning‑oriented or exploratory tasks.
  • AI‑Assisted Engineering Awareness: Shows curiosity and willingness to learn how AI‑assisted tools (e.g., test generation, code assistance, defect analysis) can be applied responsibly to improve testing and development workflows.
  • Automation Readiness: Demonstrates an interest in automated testing concepts and CI/CD pipelines, with the ability to follow established patterns and guidance provided by senior engineers.
  • Problem‑Solving Skills: Able to analyze assigned issues, ask thoughtful questions, and apply instructor or mentor feedback to resolve problems incrementally.
  • Collaboration & Communication: Works effectively with engineers, test engineers, and mentors; communicates progress, questions, and findings clearly in both verbal and written form.

Salary Range:

$46,100.00-$61,400.000

The anticipated salary range listed for this role is only an estimate. Actual compensation for successful candidates is carefully determined based on several factors including, but not limited to, location, local regulations (such as minimum wage), education/training, work experience, key skills, and type of position.

Teledyne and all of our employees are committed to conducting business with the highest ethical standards. We require all employees to comply with all applicable laws, regulations, rules and regulatory orders. Our reputation for honesty, integrity and high ethics is as important to us as our reputation for making innovative sensing solutions.
